provenance_note: Paperclip ships no static OpenAPI file; the running instance serves /api/openapi.json (503 KB) dynamically. The vendored spec.json in this directory was fetched from a live local instance and stamped with sha256:33e77b88f18a5d27bc2333a00939e9f8ec011ccbc10f364e43ba87822644c8ba. spec_url is intentionally left empty to avoid leaking a private host.

spec_source.detail: Vendored from a running Paperclip instance at the time of publish. Future regenerations should re-fetch and update the checksum.

patterns: Self-hosted single-tenant model: one Paperclip instance per workspace.
Company-scoped path parameters: most read endpoints take {companyId} in the path. Single-tenant deployments auto-resolve from the local companies cache.
Issue / Comment graph: issues list + comments list are syncable per companyId; FTS5 over the local store enables offline queries.
Plain-text LLM helper endpoints: /api/llms/*.txt return text/plain; the CLI bypasses the JSON-guarded resolver for them.
Local path-parameter shapes: dev instances may return slug-shaped IDs (local-*) instead of canonical UUIDs.
gaps: Spec is dynamic — a running Paperclip instance is required to reproduce. Vendored snapshot is the closest static representation.
Some endpoints require destructive or write-flow testing the runner skips (auth rotation, agents approve, work-products update) — Phase 5 covers reads only.
Two commands (llms list, llms list-agenticonstxt) are text endpoints; documented in .printing-press-patches/.

novel_features.name: Pre-discovery recall loop
novel_features.description: Before any discovery fetch, recall checks the local search_learnings table for a previously-taught query->resource mapping.

novel_features.name: Post-fetch teach loop
novel_features.description: After answering a question, fires teach --query --resource --resource-type in the background to record the question -> resource mapping.

novel_features.name: Candidate confirm/reject flow
novel_features.description: Surfaces trial-then-confirm candidates derived from failed-flag + corrected-retry pairs.

novel_features.name: CompanyId auto-resolution for single-tenant mirrors
novel_features.description: When a Paperclip endpoint requires companyId in the path, the CLI reads the first cached row from the local companies table and substitutes it automatically.
